properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You have felt the warmth of the fire You have seen a glimmer of light It's something that you have been missing inside Something that you have been longing to find Hold on to the yearning And wherever you are on your journey

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Live like you believe Live like you know It's one sure way Your faith will grow Listen to your heart Search in your soul And you'll find The strength that you need His light, the gift of His peace When you live like you believe

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There are things you'll have to let go And you might feel, you're just hanging on When you find yourself alone and afraid Questioning all the choices you've made Hold on to the burning He's leading you on through the journey

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hold on to the yearning And wherever you are on the journey
